mainEntity.name: Cost of denied claim appeal in Salt Lake County courts?
mainEntity.text: Cost of denied claim appeal in Salt Lake County courts?

acceptedAnswer.text: No filing fees for Labor Commission appeals; attorney contingency 20-25%.

suggestedAnswer.text: Court appeals post-Commission rare, costly if district court. Most resolve at hearing. Free case review; high win rate justifies fees.

name: Appeal Costs for Utah Work Injury Denials
description: No filing fees for Labor Commission appeals; attorney contingency 20-25%.
